notes: Safe exact-source manifest for Media Phase 3J gallery2/gallery3 completion. Wikimedia sourceUrl values intentionally omit downloadUrl so the importer resolves originals during real import. Do not download images in this task; this manifest only records verified production-safe exact sources.
